name: arg-leads-tracker
description: Shared web and mobile CRM platform for ARG Leads Tracker.

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('No asset compilation required for ARG Leads Tracker')"
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check client.js && node --check supabase-client.js && node --check enrichment.js && node --check tests/enrichment.test.js && node --check tests/pmr-voice-note.test.js && node --check tests/role-access.test.js && node --check tests/admin-salesman-permissions.e2e.test.js
scripts.test: node tests/enrichment.test.js && node tests/pmr-voice-note.test.js && node tests/role-access.test.js && node tests/admin-salesman-permissions.e2e.test.js
